Job description

Over the next few years, every financial institution will have teams of AI analysts working alongside their sharpest minds. At Endex, we're on a mission to bridge the present to the inevitable by building the most sophisticated digital coworker for financial services. We're recruiting a team to work on the frontier of agentic development and applied finance, in close collaboration with leading research labs.

What You’ll Do

As a Software Engineer at Endex, you’ll join a fast-moving, cross-functional team that’s developing the core infrastructure, data pipelines, product interfaces, and deployment systems that power our platform. You’ll work on projects spanning:

Scalable backend systems and robust APIs
High-quality data ingestion and transformation pipelines
Intuitive user interfaces for financial workflows
Secure, resilient infrastructure and deployment pipelines
Custom client-facing solutions that meet rigorous security standards

You’ll work closely with AI researchers, product leaders, and financial analysts to bring advanced tooling to life—and shape the future of finance.

You May Be a Fit If You…

Have experience building mission-critical backend systems, APIs, and services
Have designed secure, scalable infrastructure in regulated or on-prem environments
Know how to build and maintain data models, pipelines, and monitoring systems
Enjoy translating complex business logic into clean technical solutions
Have strong product instincts and care deeply about user experience
Are curious about finance and motivated by real-world impact
Are excited to work on-site with a tight-knit, high-ownership team
